expectations.text: Output contains a BaseTool subclass with onPointerDown, onPointerMove, onPointerUp, and drawOverlay methods
expectations.evidence: ArcWallTool class has all four methods, though not explicitly extending a BaseTool base class

expectations.text: drawArcWall rendering function uses ctx.arc(), ctx.arcTo(), or bezierCurveTo() — not a straight lineTo()
expectations.evidence: drawArcWall calls ctx.arc() for outer and inner arcs

expectations.text: JSON wall schema includes start, end, midpoint (or controlPoint), thickness, and type fields
expectations.evidence: Schema includes startX/Y, endX/Y, midX/Y, thickness, kind:'arc'

expectations.text: Exterior wall color #2C2C2C and interior #555555 (or equivalent project palette) used in drawArcWall
expectations.evidence: Uses generic '#333333' — not the project's specified exterior (#2C2C2C) or interior (#555555) palette

expectations.text: Math.round() or integer pixel coords used for canvas drawing (Hi-DPI / sub-pixel awareness)
expectations.evidence: No Math.round() calls — raw floating point coords passed to ctx.arc() and ctx.arc()

expectations.text: ctx.save() and ctx.restore() bracket the drawing operations
expectations.evidence: ctx.save() / ctx.restore() present in drawOverlay but missing in drawArcWall itself

expectations.text: Three-click workflow correctly staged: start, end, arc midpoint (or equivalent two-phase approach)
expectations.evidence: clicks array accumulates 3 points; commits on the third click
